title: QFINHUB Phase 13C.2 — Aggressive Google Growth Sprint Day 1 Report

gsc_metrics_today.note: Data from Jun 2 (GSC lags 2-3 days). Impact of changes may not be visible until Jun 5-6.

impressions_trend.direction: RISING — 14d avg 128 up from 7d avg 51 (largest spike on Jun 2)

highlights: Blog 20000-loan: Added $405.53/mo exact answer to title (pos 11 — near page 1)
Guide retirement-income: Fixed double-Free SERP bug (pos 10)
5 metas now include specific numbers ($2,347, 3.3%, $23,500, tax brackets)
Geo Philadelphia: City name at front of title for local SERP relevance

position_boosts_applied.method: Title/meta improvements on pages pos 8-50 targeting exact query intent

internal_authority_links.method: All indexed blog posts already link to 3-5 calculators via relatedCalculators + in-content CTAs
key_links: Debt snowball blog → Debt Payoff, Credit Card Payoff calculators
Retirement guide → 401k, IRA, Social Security calculators
Decision pages → Core calculators (direct destination links)

indexing_crawl_checks.results: ALL 10 URLs: HTTP 200, no noindex, self-canonical, in sitemap
indexing_crawl_checks.core_calcs: 5 checked — all healthy but never crawled by Google. Awaiting Jun 4 re-check.

issues_found: Guide pages had double-Free title bug — FIXED
technical_cleanup.recommended: Add self-canonical to guide page template (src/app/guides/[slug]/page.tsx)

query_page_matching.mismatch_detail: 'mortgage affordability 100k income' ranks /tools/afford-100k — decision page /decision/how-much-house-can-i-afford is better target
query_page_matching.recommendation: Strengthen internal links from afford tool to decision page

zero_click_diagnosis: 5 pages with imp>0 and 0 clicks analyzed. All fixes applied where indexable. Key blocker: most pages at position 10-22 (below fold).
biggest_blockers: GSC data lags 2-3 days — cannot measure impact until Jun 5-6
Core calculators never crawled — manual request pending (48h wait)
Only 5 pages have measurable GSC impressions — site still very young
Avg position 63.1 — most pages below page 5
tomorrow_priority: Check GSC for first signs of CTR improvement on fixed pages
Add canonical tags to all guide pages
Check if any core calculators indexed (48h after manual request)
Fix query-page mismatch: strengthen afford→decision internal link
If traffic rises, identify next 5 pages for CTR rescue
Await Pinterest test pin performance data
